assets.name: tenant-shadow-figure
assets.revisedPrompt: Full-body original game character sprite for a dark apartment surveillance mystery game. A young adult tenant standing upright, fully clothed in a modest everyday indoor outfit: oversized dark hoodie, long loose pants, socks, layered casual clothing. Calm anxious posture, face partially shadowed, cinematic noir mood, muted blue-gray palette, semi-realistic stylized game art, clean silhouette, front view, centered composition, suitable as a character asset for a room monitoring UI. Safe non-graphic scene, neutral pose. No text, no logo, no watermark. Strictly placed on a SOLID UNIFORM #00B140 chroma key flat color background. The background is a single uniform shade of #00B140 chroma key green that fills 100% of pixels not occupied by the character. No gradient, no shadow, no texture, no scenery, no ground, no decoration, no environmental elements. Pure flat color background, exactly like a green screen used for VFX compositing.
